questions.prompt: You are joining the Highland Trails Hiking Club. Answer the questions. Use 1-5 words.

questions.text: How often do you go walking?
What is your favourite kind of scenery?
What do you usually take on a hike?
Who do you like to walk with?
Which trail would you like to try?

questions.prompt: You are a new member of the Highland Trails Hiking Club. Tell the club a little about yourself and why you enjoy walking. Write 20-30 words.
You are chatting with members in the Highland Trails Hiking Club group chat. Reply to each message. Write 30-40 words per reply.

messages.author: Diana
messages.text: Welcome to the club! What made you want to join our hikes?

messages.author: Rashid
messages.text: We're planning a picnic at the summit next month. What food should we bring?

messages.author: Chloe
messages.text: Tell us about a beautiful place in nature that you have visited.

questions.prompt: You received this email from the Highland Trails Hiking Club. Write two replies.

email.subject: Important change to our Saturday walks
email.body: Dear members, We are writing to tell you about an important change to our Saturday walks. From 1 August, our meeting point will move from the town square to the new Riverside car park, and we will set off half an hour earlier, at 7:30 a.m. This change lets us reach the trails before they become busy and helps us avoid the town-centre traffic. Any regular walker who needs a lift should contact the committee. We hope you understand, and we look forward to seeing you. Best wishes, The Highland Trails Committee
